en.extract:
The wailing cisticola (Cisticola lais) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Angola,  Eswatini, Lesotho, Malawi, Mozambique, South Africa, Tanzania, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland.
Lynes's cisticola of Uganda, Kenya and northern Tanzania is sometimes regarded as a subspecies of this species.
The appearance of their eggs varies widely; they can be white, pale blue, spotted, or streaked.


References


External links
Wailing cisticola  - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.

It is found in [[Angola]], [[Eswatini]], [[Lesotho]], [[Malawi]], [[Mozambique]], [[South Africa]], [[Tanzania]], [[Zambia]], and [[Zimbabwe]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical high-altitude [[grassland]]. [[Lynes's cisticola]] of Uganda, Kenya and northern Tanzania is sometimes regarded as a [[subspecies]] of this species.{{cite web |last1=Ryan |first1=Peter |last2=Dean |first2=Ryan |date=2006-01-01 |title=Wailing Cisticola (''Cisticola lais'') version 1.0 |editor1-last=del Hoyo |editor1-first=J. | editor2-last=Elliott |editor2-first=A. |editor3-last=Sargatal | editor3-first=J. |editor4-last=Christie |editor4-first=D.A. | editor5-last=de Juana |editor5-first=E. |work=Handbook of the Birds of the World Alive |publisher=Cornell Lab of Ornithology |location=Ithaca, NY, USA | url=http://www.hbw.com/node/58619 |access-date=27 August 2017 |url-access=subscription |doi=10.2173/bow.waicis1.01}} The appearance of their eggs varies widely; they can be white, pale blue, spotted, or streaked.{{Cite journal |last=Krausová |first=Ladislava |last2=Veselý |first2=Petr |last3=Syrová |first3=Michaela |last4=Antonová |first4=Kateřina |last5=Fišer |first5=Ondřej |last6=Chlumská |first6=Vanda |last7=Pátková |first7=Markéta |last8=Pužej |first8=Šimon |last9=Fuchs |first9=Roman |date=2022-12-23 |title=Red‐backed shrike (Lanius collurio) versus common cuckoo (Cuculus canorus): An example of ineffective cuckoo–hawk mimicry |url=https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/epdf/10.1002/ece3.9664 |journal=[[Ecology and Evolution]] |volume=12 |issue=12 |article-number=e9664 |doi=10.1002/ece3.9664 |doi-access=free |issn=2045-7758 |pmc=9789018 |pmid=36582776 |s2cid=255120648}} ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== * Wailing cisticola - [http://sabap2.adu.org.za/docs/sabap1/670.pdf Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds]. {{Taxonbar|from=Q2225735}} [[Category:Cisticola|wailing cisticola]] [[Category:Afromontane endemic bird species]] [[Category:Birds described in 1870|wailing cisticola]] [[Category:Taxonomy articles created by Polbot]] {{Cisticolidae-stub}}
